ARIC engine proven at tier-1 banks
Handles card, ACH and real-time rails

review.verdict: Top-shelf real-time fraud ML for banks and processors willing to invest in a long, deep integration.
review.best_for: Banks and payment processors running real-time fraud on card and faster-payment rails.
review.not_for: E-commerce or SaaS looking for a quick API with self-serve pricing.
